languages.text: Вы обнаружили шаттл, передающий сигнал бедствия, с телом Рубана Хрошовача в пилотском кресле.

traits.locale_text: Вы обнаружили шаттл, передающий сигнал бедствия, с телом Рубана Хрошовача в пилотском кресле.

languages.text: You discovered a shuttle transmitting a distress signal, with the body of the pilot, Ruban Khoroshkavich, still in his seat.
languages.original_text: Вы обнаружили шаттл, передающий сигнал бедствия, с телом Рубана Хрошовача в пилотском кресле.

traits.locale_text: You discovered a shuttle transmitting a distress signal, with the body of Ruban Khoroshkavich in the pilot's seat.
You discovered a shuttle transmitting a distress signal, with the body of Ruban Khoroshkavich in the pilot's seat.
You discovered a shuttle transmitting a distress signal, with the body of the pilot, Ruban Khoroshkavich, still in his seat.
You discovered a shuttle transmitting a distress signal, with the body of the pilot, Ruban Khoroshkavich, still in his seat.

languages.text: Descubriste una lanzadera que transmitía una señal de socorro con el cadáver de su piloto, Ruban Khoroshkavich, a los mandos.
languages.original_text: You discovered a shuttle transmitting a distress signal, with the body of the pilot, Ruban Khoroshkavich, still in his seat.

traits.locale_text: Descubriste una lanzadera que transmitía una señal de socorro con el cadáver de su piloto, Ruban Khoroshkavich, a los mandos.

languages.text: 你发现了一艘正在发出求救信号的穿梭机，飞行员鲁班·霍罗什维奇的尸体仍坐在驾驶座上。
languages.original_text: You discovered a shuttle transmitting a distress signal, with the body of the pilot, Ruban Khoroshkavich, still in his seat.

traits.locale_text: 你发现了一艘正在发出求救信号的穿梭机，飞行员鲁班·霍罗什维奇的尸体仍坐在驾驶座上。

languages.text: Vous avez découvert une navette transmettant un signal de détresse. Le cadavre du pilote, Ruban Khoroshkavich, se trouvait encore dans son siège.
languages.original_text: You discovered a shuttle transmitting a distress signal, with the body of the pilot, Ruban Khoroshkavich, still in his seat.

traits.locale_text: Vous avez découvert une navette transmettant un signal de détresse. Le cadavre du pilote, Ruban Khoroshkavich, se trouvait encore dans son siège.

languages.text: İmdat çağrısı gönderen bir mekik keşfettin. Pilot koltuğunda da Ruban Khoroshkavich'in cansız bedeni vardı.
languages.original_text: You discovered a shuttle transmitting a distress signal, with the body of the pilot, Ruban Khoroshkavich, still in his seat.

traits.locale_text: İmdat çağrısı gönderen bir mekik keşfettin. Pilot koltuğunda da Ruban Khoroshkavich'in cansız bedeni vardı.

languages.text: あなたは、 遭難信号を送信しているシャトルを発見し、パイロットのルバン・クロロスカヴィッチの遺体は操縦席にまだ座っていた。
languages.original_text: You discovered a shuttle transmitting a distress signal, with the body of the pilot, Ruban Khoroshkavich, still in his seat.

traits.locale_text: あなたは、 遭難信号を送信しているシャトルを発見し、パイロットのルバン・クロロスカヴィッチの遺体は操縦席にまだ座っていた。

languages.text: Du hast ein Shuttle entdeckt, das ein Notsignal sendet. Die Leiche des Piloten, Ruban Khoroshkavich, saß noch im Cockpit.
languages.original_text: You discovered a shuttle transmitting a distress signal, with the body of the pilot, Ruban Khoroshkavich, still in his seat.

traits.locale_text: Du hast ein Shuttle entdeckt, das ein Notsignal sendet. Die Leiche des Piloten, Ruban Khoroshkavich, saß noch im Cockpit.
